organic-the-best-way-to-send-money-home-.hook: The best way to send money home is already built into your phone — most people just don't know it yet.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator on phone, frustrated face — 'I used to lose $15 every time I sent money to my family.' Beat 2 (9-25s): Screen-record Speed app, showing $200 send with $0 fee landing in seconds. Beat 3 (26-45s): Cut to reaction — 'My mom got it instantly. No bank. No fees. Just Bitcoin Lightning.' Beat 4 (46-58s): Text overlay — 'Download Speed. Send money home free. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Film on iPhone, natural home lighting. Use Speed's in-app send flow as screen record. No voiceover needed — subtitles only. Hashtags: #remittance #sendmoneyhome #bitcoinlightning #zerofees

organic-i-tried-bitcoin-for-the-first-ti.hook: I tried Bitcoin for the first time and it took me 47 seconds — here's exactly what I did.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-7s): Talking head — 'I always thought Bitcoin was complicated. I was wrong.' Beat 2 (8-28s): Unboxing-style screen record: download Speed, create account, receive first sat from a friend — timer on screen showing elapsed seconds. Beat 3 (29-48s): React to balance — 'That's actual Bitcoin. On my phone. Right now.' Beat 4 (49-58s): CTA — 'Drop a 🟠 if you want me to show you how to spend it next.'
payload.production_notes: Speed app screen record stitched with face-cam reaction. Keep timer widget visible throughout to reinforce '47 seconds' claim. Comment CTA drives engagement signal for algo boost.

organic-hundi-is-illegal-and-millions-of.hook: Hundi is illegal — and millions of families are still using it because no one showed them this.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-10s): Hook spoken to camera — explain Hundi briefly: 'It's informal, unregulated, and if it goes wrong your money is just… gone.' Beat 2 (11-30s): Contrast: 'Speed uses Bitcoin Lightning. It's instant, it's legal, and the fee is literally zero.' Beat 3 (31-48s): Show $500 send on screen — recipient receives notification in real time. Beat 4 (49-58s): 'Your family deserves better than a handshake deal. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Talking head first half, screen record second half. Add captions in Urdu or Nepali subtitle track for diaspora audiences. Tag relevant community accounts. Keep tone empathetic, not fear-mongering.

organic-bitcoin-has-been-declared-dead-4.hook: Bitcoin has been declared dead 472 times. Meanwhile I just deposited at my sportsbook in 3 seconds.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Text-on-screen stat animation — '472 times declared dead' with tombstone emoji, then smash cut to creator laughing. Beat 2 (9-25s): 'Every time I try to deposit with a card it gets blocked. With Speed + Lightning it just… works.' Beat 3 (26-45s): Screen record of Speed send to a Lightning-enabled iGaming site — funds arrive, balance updates live. Beat 4 (46-58s): 'Stop fighting your bank. Start using Speed. Zero fees, instant, every time.'
payload.production_notes: Open with bold text animation (free in CapCut). Screen record the deposit flow — blur site name if compliance requires. Use upbeat background music. Hashtags: #sportsbetting #bitcoindeposit #lightningnetwork #igaming

organic-crypto-gave-me-financial-freedom.hook: Crypto gave me financial freedom — and it started with something smaller than a penny.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-9s): UGC creator — 'I didn't buy a whole Bitcoin. I started with a few sats and actually used them.' Beat 2 (10-28s): Show Speed wallet, receive a small Lightning payment, instantly send to a friend — zero fee. Beat 3 (29-46s): 'That moment I sent money across the world for free — that's when I got it.' Beat 4 (47-58s): 'Download Speed. Your first Bitcoin experience, done right. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Authentic UGC tone — avoid polished look. Natural lighting, casual clothes. Can be repurposed as a whitelisted creator ad. Encourage creator to respond to every comment in first 30 minutes for algo boost.

paid-you-just-lost-23-sending-200-to-you.hook: You just lost $23 sending $200 to your family. There's a better way.
paid-you-just-lost-23-sending-200-to-you.estimate: $1.80-$2.50 (below $3.17 benchmark — high-intent diaspora segment, strong fee-pain creative angle)

payload.problem: Voiceover over split screen: left side shows a traditional wire transfer with $23 fee and 3-day delay; right side shows a phone with a notification saying 'Transfer pending.' Text overlay: 'Banks and apps like Western Union take up to 12% in fees. Your family gets less. Every single time.'
payload.solution: Screen record of Speed app: user opens app, types $200, hits send. Cut to recipient's phone — balance updates in under 5 seconds. Text overlay: '$0 fees. Instant. Powered by Bitcoin Lightning.' Creator face-cam reaction: 'My mom got it before I even put my phone down.'
payload.cta: Download Speed. Send money home free. Zero fees, forever.
payload.audience: Meta — Facebook + Instagram. Targeting: Hispanic/Latino US adults 22-45, Filipino-American US adults 22-45, South Asian diaspora US adults 22-45. Lookalike: remittance app installers. Placement: Reels + Feed.

paid-i-wanted-to-try-bitcoin-but-every-a.hook: I wanted to try Bitcoin but every app felt like a exam. Then I found Speed.
paid-i-wanted-to-try-bitcoin-but-every-a.estimate: $2.20-$3.00 (near benchmark — curiosity-gap hook + frictionless demo should outperform category average of $3.17)

payload.problem: Talking head (relatable UGC creator): 'Coinbase asked for my ID, my selfie, my blood type — I just wanted to try Bitcoin. Every other app was confusing or took days.' Cut to frustrated scroll through complex exchange UI.
payload.solution: Screen record Speed onboarding: 60-second account creation, receive first sats from a friend, send $5 back. Text overlays count the steps: '1. Download. 2. Create account. 3. You have Bitcoin.' Creator: 'I had actual Bitcoin in my wallet before my coffee got cold.'
payload.cta: Download Speed. Your first Bitcoin in under 60 seconds.
payload.audience: TikTok Ads — interest targeting: cryptocurrency beginners, personal finance, fintech apps. Age 18-34, US. Behavioral: users who have watched crypto explainer content but have no crypto app installed.

paid-your-card-just-got-declined-at-depo.hook: Your card just got declined at deposit. Again.
paid-your-card-just-got-declined-at-depo.estimate: $2.50-$3.50 (slight premium possible due to smaller iGaming segment pool, but high-intent pain point should hold near benchmark)

payload.problem: Quick cuts: card declined notification, frustrated person at phone, missed opportunity on a live bet. Voiceover: 'Banks block gambling deposits. It happens every time. And by the time it clears, the moment's gone.'
payload.solution: Screen record: open Speed, send Bitcoin via Lightning to a gaming site. Funds appear in 3 seconds. Voiceover: 'Speed uses Bitcoin Lightning — instant, unstoppable, zero fees. No bank can block it. No delays. Just play.' Text overlay: 'Works with every Lightning-enabled platform.'
payload.cta: Download Speed. Instant deposits. Every time.
payload.audience: TikTok Ads — interest targeting: sports betting, online casinos, fantasy sports, Bitcoin. Age 21-45, US. Exclude: known problem gambling exclusion lists where available. Run in-feed only.
